title: Free-list experiment protocol
author: Franjieh, Michael
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Instructions for the free-list experiment to uncover knowledge of possessive classifiers and their members in Oceanic languages. This has been used with speakers of six Oceanic languages spoken in Vanuatu (Merei, Lewo, Vatlongos and North Ambrym) and New Caledonia (Nêlêmwa and Iaai). The protocol is in English, Bislama and French.
steps_raw: Instructions for the free-list experiment to uncover knowledge of possessive classifiers and their members in Oceanic languages.
